exploration_notes: Traced the full alertmanager notification pipeline across the prometheus/alertmanager repo (found via sourcegraph/alertmanager fork since the canonical repo wasn't indexed). The pipeline flows as follows: (1) **Alert ingestion**: `api/v2/api.go:postAlertsHandler` validates incoming alerts and calls `api.alerts.Put()` to store them via the provider interface (`provider/provider.go`, implemented in `provider/mem/mem.go`). (2) **Dispatcher subscription**: `dispatch/dispatch.go:Dispatcher.run()` sub
